name: player_team success rate range year_offset pools over window (executed-result parity)
description: Seed team ZZ plays across 2024 (2 of 3 successful) and 2025 (1 of 1), with the test player on ZZ both years. The player variant pools the team's plays in the player's games over the offset window = 3/4 = 0.75, proving the pid-keyed gamelogs join projects year+week and recombines num/den across both offset years.
expected_query: with "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(*) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator, sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_gamelogs"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" inner join "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" on "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."nfl_team" and "nfl_games"."season_year" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."year" and "nfl_games"."week" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."week" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats.team_success_rate_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats.team_success_rate_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats WHERE tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_player_team_stats.pid = player.pid) AS "team_success_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN successful_play THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS team_success_rate_from_plays_0 FROM nfl_plays WHERE off='ZZ' AND year IN (2024,2025) AND seas_type='REG' AND play_type <> 'NOPL'
